passive.name: Drakehound's Step
passive.description: Entering an attack or movement command while casting an ability will cause Ambessa to dash a short distance once the ability is cast, granting her next attack bonus range, damage, and attack speed, and refunding energy.

Q.name: Cunning Sweep / Sundering Slam
Q.description: Ambessa sweeps her twin drakehounds in a semicircle in front of her, dealing bonus damage to enemies hit by the blades. Striking an enemy will transform the next cast of this ability for a short period of time, causing her to slam her twin drakehounds down in a line in front of her, dealing bonus damage to the first enemy hit.
Q.tooltip:
Cunning Sweep: Ambessa sweeps her blades forward, dealing {{ calc_damage_1_max }} + {{ calc_damage_1_percent_max }} max Health physical damage to enemies at the edge of the strike. All other enemies take {{ calc_damage_1_min_ratio }} damage. Striking an enemy readies a Sundering Slam.

Sundering Slam: Ambessa slams her blades down, dealing {{ calc_damage_2_max }} + {{ calc_damage_2_percent_max }} max Health physical damage against the first enemy hit. All other enemies take {{ calc_damage_2_min_ratio }} damage.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

W.name: Repudiation
W.description: Ambessa gains a shield, briefly braces herself, and then slams the ground to damage nearby enemies. If she blocked any non-minion damage while bracing herself, this ability will deal increased damage.
W.tooltip: Ambessa gains {{ calc_shield }} Shield for {{ shield_duration }} seconds and braces herself for {{ buff_duration }} seconds. She then slams the ground, dealing {{ calc_damage_low }} physical damage to nearby enemies, which increases to {{ calc_damage_high }} physical damage if she braced herself from damage from an enemy champion, large monster, or structure.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

E.name: Lacerate
E.description: Ambessa whips her twin drakehounds around herself, damaging and slowing nearby enemies. Initiating Drakehound's Step from this ability causes her to strike a second time at the end of its dash.
E.tooltip: Ambessa whips her chains around, dealing {{ calc_damage_flat }} physical damage and Slowing enemies by {{ slow_amount*100 }}%, which decays over {{ slow_duration }} second. Initiating Drakehound's Step from this Ability will trigger an additional strike.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

R.name: Public Execution
R.description: Ambessa blinks to the farthest enemy champion in a line of her choosing and suppresses them upon her arrival. She then slams the enemy into the ground where they take damage and are stunned.
R.tooltip:
Passive: Ambessa gains {{ armor_penetration*100 }}% %i:scaleAPen% Armor Penetration and her Abilities heal her for {{ calc_omnivamp }} of the damage she dealt.

Active: Ambessa becomes Unstoppable and blinks to the farthest enemy champion in a line, Suppressing the target for {{ suppress_duration }} seconds and then slamming them into the ground, dealing {{ calc_damage }} physical damage and Stunning them for {{ stun_duration }} seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}
